html:
2026-0424
2026-05-07PCHCanadian Race Relations Foundation ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations FoundationReappointment of Nancy Rosenfeld of Montréal, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, on a part-time basis, effective July 1, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation
precis: Reappointment of Nancy Rosenfeld of Montréal, Quebec, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, on a part-time basis, effective July 1, 2026.
